name: warda-strike-reconstruction-3d
description: High-fidelity CesiumJS + Three.js 3D reconstruction of the IMP-08 Iran→Dubai (Warda Apartments) Shahed-136 strike, with real satellite imagery, full launch→impact trajectory, 8 camera modes, VIIRS-driven thermal/IR overwatch and an endurance-derived geofence. OnDemand Vision-Drone overwatch edition.
